title: Development Settings
subtitle: Configure development tools and debugging options
logging.title: Logging
logging.level.label: Log Level
logging.level.hint: Controls the verbosity of logging across the application. Higher levels include all lower levels.
logging.location.label: Log File Location
debug.title: Debug Tools
debug.devtools.label: Developer Tools
debug.devtools.hint: Enable Chrome DevTools in renderer process
langfuse.title: Langfuse Observability
langfuse.description: Configure Langfuse for AI agent tracing and analytics
langfuse.enabled.label: Enable Langfuse
langfuse.enabled.hint: Send telemetry data to Langfuse for observability
langfuse.publicKey.label: Public Key
langfuse.publicKey.hint: Your Langfuse public key from the project settings
langfuse.secretKey.label: Secret Key
langfuse.secretKey.hint: Your Langfuse secret key from the project settings
langfuse.host.label: Host URL (Optional)
langfuse.host.hint: Leave empty for cloud version or enter your self-hosted URL
database.title: Database
database.purgeThreads.label: Purge Thread Tables
database.purgeThreads.hint: Delete all threads, messages, and tags data. Tables will be recreated empty.
database.purgeThreads.confirm: This will delete all threads, messages, and tags. Are you sure?
database.purgeSettings.label: Purge Settings Tables
database.purgeSettings.hint: Delete all provider and model configuration. Tables will be recreated with defaults.
database.purgeSettings.confirm: This will reset all provider and model settings to defaults. Are you sure?
